name: parsly-mcp
description: Let Claude read any website for you — Instagram, Reddit, and more. Parsly connects Claude, Cursor, and ChatGPT to a Chrome extension that extracts structured data from any website you can open in a tab. No scraping infrastructure required.

tools.name: parsly_list_operations
tools.description: List all available browser automation operations with their descriptions and parameters

tools.name: parsly_run_operation
tools.description: Run an operation on a URL and return structured data extracted from the page

tools.name: parsly_get_status
tools.description: Check whether the Parsly Chrome extension is connected and ready

tools.name: parsly_fetch_image
tools.description: Fetch an image URL through the Chrome extension and return it as an inline image
